subcodes.first_line: To see the joy of divine gladness on your faces is the cause of my happiness, for when I see you happy, I am happy also.
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @power of the Manifestation of God, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @unity; oneness of humanity, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @oneness; unity of religion, @martyrs and martyrdom
